Title: Luna Tear Pendenta
Body (HTML):
The Luna Tear represents the pinnacle of our lunar-inspired design philosophy. Centered around a D-color, internally flawless pear-cut diamond, this piece captures the essence of nocturnal brilliance. Every micro-diamond in the platinum chain is hand-selected to ensure a continuous line of light.

Specifications:
- 5.02 Carat Center Stone
- D Color / IF Clarity
- 950 Platinum
- GIA Certified

Title: Solaris Eternal
Body (HTML):
Inspired by the first light of dawn, the Solaris Eternal features a rare vivid yellow diamond. The emerald cut provides a clean, architectural brilliance that contrasts beautifully with the warmth of the hand-crafted rose gold setting.

Specifications:
- 3.5 Carat Vivid Yellow
- VS1 Clarity
- 18k Rose Gold
- Conflict-Free Sourcing

Title: Aurora Borealis
Body (HTML):
Capturing the dancing lights of the north, these earrings feature a complex pattern of marquise and brilliant-cut diamonds. Designed to move with the wearer, they create a shimmering effect that is visible from across a room.

Specifications:
- Total 8.2 Carats
- E Color / VVS1
- White Gold Setting
- Articulated Design
